fundamentals.name: iShares Silver Trust
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The Trust seeks to reflect such performance before payment of the Trust's expenses and liabilities. It is not actively managed. The Trust does not engage in any activities designed to obtain a profit from, or to ameliorate losses caused by, changes in the price of silver.

news.paragraph: Silver prices, tracked by SLV, are facing downward pressure due to weakening demand, according to recent analysis. While SLV has seen significant gains over the past year, concerns about its expense ratio and tax implications have been raised. Furthermore, some analysts suggest that other silver ETFs may offer superior performance.
